mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ha_user_note (id, user_id, source_type, source_key, topic, content, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceKey}, #{topic}, #{content}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE ha_user_note SET content = #{content}, topic = #{topic}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
